text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day in February...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chatter, chatter...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
My! It's quite crowded. And the tables aren't even
set yet.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Buono! Is everyone here? This is more than I
expected!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
But the more, the merrier! All right, everyone! To
the kitchen!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hmm?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: (Why am I making chocolate?!)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
(I somehow got swept up in the crowd, but I guess
someone will let me know if I'm not supposed to
be here...)

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Your tempering technique is amazing! And
your attention to detail is bona fide buono!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Um... Thank you...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Aaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crash!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh, my! Are you all right?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: I-I think so...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Thank goodness. Was it only the one bowl that
you dropped? That's not so bad. There's no need
to panic—we'll get this taken care of in no time.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Why did I stay the whole time?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I have training in five minutes! What am I going to
do with all this?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I already bought chocolates for Trainer. If I were
to give something homemade as well, it might
give the wrong impression...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm overthinking this. It's totally fine to give both
store-bought and homemade chocolate. And I
can always explain myself, if necessary.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hello, Trainer! I'm ready to get to work.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you certainly seem ready to go. But before
that, I wanted to thank you for everything—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Huh? O-oh, no! It's nothing! There's absolutely
nothing wrong at all!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I-it's just, today is Valentine's Day, right? So, I
thought I might g-give you some chocolates!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
So, happy Valentine's Day! Thank you for all of
your expert instruction!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Now, let's get to work, shall we? I'll start warming
up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her strange behavior, the chocolates she
gives me are simply delicious.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ah, uhhh... Ummm... Let me start first by saying...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Today is Valentine's Day. It's a day in which
people have traditionally expressed affection.
However, it has also become a day in which to
express gratitude and friendship.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, the act of offering chocolates to those
we feel indebted to should not be considered
unusual in any way or have any presumed subtext
associated with it!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
So, I got some chocolates for you. I bought them
at the store the other day.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: But wait, there's more! I also have these for you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: They're... I, uh, made them myself.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
O-of course! I think they accurately convey my
feelings of gratitude. Although, truthfully, even
two may be inadequate for that...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't planning on making homemade
chocolates, but I think they turned out fairly well.
I hope you like them.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
If you find yourself preferring the ones that I
made, I'll bear that in mind and focus more of my
efforts to that end next time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although both are good, the homemade ones
seem to taste just a bit sweeter.
